_comment: Symbol-sealing policy. For the SHARED flagship the seal is an export-table policy applied at link time (only these symbols leave the library); ICU/zlib/etc. stay internal. See planning/v8-builder-proposal.md §6/§6b. D7 = general audience, so the keep set is V8's full public ABI, NOT a Pulp-narrowed scrape.

audit._comment_absl: P0.3a finding (2026-06-03): libnode flat-exports 558 absl symbols and Dawn carries 3212; two Abseil copies in one binary => raw_hash_set PerTableSeed ODR abort. Sealing MUST cover Abseil (and likely protobuf), not just ICU/zlib. libnode does NOT seal absl, so it is not a clean coexistence provider with Dawn.
audit.pulp_completeness_check: scrape undefined v8::/cppgc:: from Pulp's js_v8_engine.cpp + choc wrapper; the export set MUST be a superset (completeness check only, never a narrowing)
